vllm.title: [Core][Bugfix]: fix prefix caching for blockv2
vllm.author: leiwen83
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Previously, we mistake didn't delete block from _cached_blocks's tracking list when it pop from evictor, which would cause immutable allocator still could get that "cached" block, even it is already being freed into hashless as mutablable allocator did in the middle.
FILL IN THE PR DESCRIPTION HERE

vllm.title: [Kernel][Backend][Model] Blocksparse flash attention kernel and Phi-3-Small model
vllm.author: linxihui
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Supports of Microsoft Phi-3-Small-8K and Phi-3-Small-128K models, which use blocksparse flash attention
Prefilling Triton kernel for block-sparse attn
Modified paged attention CUDA with the block-sparse attention, which allows hybrid sparsity pattern for each attention head.
Use torch SPDA in prefil

vllm.title: [Misc] add logging level env var
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
It seems logger.debug information can only be turned on via a config file, which is not convenient (I never write a config file).
This PR adds an environment variable to change the default logging level users can see. It will help troubleshooting issues.
